options.content:
|Req ID|Requirement|Target|Current|Status|Linked parameter|
|---|---|---:|---:|---|---|
|REQ-RNG|daily range|${rangeKm} km|300 km|OK|LH2 / SOFC / SSB|
|REQ-FLR|low floor thickness|340-450 mm|420-450 mm|WATCH|battery / LH2 / reformer|
|REQ-ENE|energy balance|demand<=supply|360 kWh/day|OK|gas/H2/electric mix|
|REQ-OPS|fleet availability|>=95%|94.8%|WATCH|refill / queue / uptime|
|REQ-PL|contribution index|>=100|104|OK|energy cost / utilization|

|Subsystem|Input|Value|Unit|KPI linked|
|---|---|---:|---|---|
|SOFC|rated output|${sofcKw}|kW|base-load / uptime|
|SSB|capacity|${batteryKwh}|kWh|transient / weight / thickness|
|LH2|buffer mass|${lh2Kg}|kg|range / storage volume|
|Fuel mix|city gas|${gasRatio}|%|cost / reformer package|
|Fuel mix|hydrogen|${h2Ratio}|%|range / LH2 volume|
|Fuel mix|electricity|${elecRatio}|%|battery package / cost|
|Mission|distance|${rangeKm}|km/day|energy demand|
|Vehicle|efficiency|${kwhKm}|kWh/km|energy demand|

|Component|H|W|D|Mass|Performance|
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
|SOFC module|300|1000|1400|520 kg|${sofcKw} kW|
|Reformer|350|350|700|180 kg|gas conversion|
|LH2 tank|600|350|1400|260 kg|${lh2Kg} kg-H2|
|SSB pack|200|1200|2200|1800 kg|${batteryKwh} kWh|
|Cooling|250|500|1400|240 kg|thermal margin|
|Inverter/DC|180|420|650|120 kg|electric conversion|

|Energy|Share|Input energy|Usable energy|Unit price|Cost/day|
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
|City gas|${gasRatio}%|420 kWh|252 kWh|${gasJPY}|31,700|
|Hydrogen|${h2Ratio}%|180 kWh|108 kWh|${h2JPY}|5,940|
|Electric|${elecRatio}%|0 kWh|0 kWh|${elecJPY}|0|
|Total|100%|600 kWh|360 kWh|-|37,640|

Demand = ${rangeKm} km Ă— ${kwhKm} kWh/km = 360 kWh/day

|Stack item|Height|Design action|KPI effect|
|---|---:|---|---|
|base floor + insulation|80|fixed allowance|NVH / thermal|
|SSB pack|200|underfloor center|weight / floor|
|LH2 tank|600|side / subframe package|range / thickness pressure|
|SOFC module|300|distributed package|uptime / thermal|
|Reformer|350|front/side package|city gas support|
|Cooling|250|front thermal path|durability|
|routing margin|80|pipe/wire clearance|maintainability|
|calculated target band|420-450|layout compression required|accessibility / conversion|

|KPI|Base|Current|Delta|Judge|
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
|Vehicle mass|12.0 t|13.1 t|+1.1 t|WATCH|
|Payload|3.0 t|2.4 t|-0.6 t|WATCH|
|Floor thickness|400 mm|435 mm|+35 mm|OK|
|Fleet availability|96.0%|94.8%|-1.2 pt|WATCH|
|Energy cost/day|42,800|37,640|-12.1%|OK|
|Trips/day|1.70|1.63|-4.1%|WATCH|
|Contribution index|100|104|+4.0|OK|

|Scenario|Gas|H2|Electric|Cost/day|Thickness risk|Contribution|
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---:|
|Current|${gasRatio}%|${h2Ratio}%|${elecRatio}%|37,640|medium|104|
|Cost minimum|75%|10%|15%|31,900|medium-high|111|
|Packaging balance|55%|25%|20%|36,400|low|108|
|Range priority|40%|45%|15%|48,200|high|96|

Best trade-off: packaging balance, not cost minimum.

|Verification|Input changed|Requirement affected|KPI affected|Result|
|---|---|---|---|---|
|energy mix sweep|gas/H2/electric price|REQ-ENE / REQ-PL|cost / contribution|PASS|
|battery capacity sweep|SSB kWh|REQ-FLR / REQ-OPS|mass / floor / uptime|WATCH|
|LH2 buffer sweep|LH2 kg|REQ-RNG / REQ-FLR|range / thickness|WATCH|
|SOFC output sweep|SOFC kW|REQ-OPS / REQ-ENE|availability / energy|PASS|
|package stack check|component H/W/D|REQ-FLR|floor / accessibility|WATCH|
